mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO VX_attrsBase (id, userid, name, enrollInDate, type, createTime) VALUES
(#{item.id}, #{item.userid}, #{item.name}, #{item.enrollInDate}, #{item.type}, #{item.createTime})
mapper.select:
SELECT userid, enrollInDate FROM VX_attrsBase WHERE name = '工号' AND enrollInDate IN
#{staffNo}
